tasks.title: Rate-limit watchdog + auto-restart script
tasks.notes: COMPLETED 2026-05-15. scripts/rate_limit_watchdog.py (149 lines, stdlib only). on-stop: if five_hour.used_percentage >= 95%, sends Telegram ratelimit alert + writes scratchpad/rate_limit_queue.json + schedules Windows Task ANDY_RL_RESTART via schtasks to fire 'claude --continue' at resets_at epoch. on-start: if queue file exists, sends Telegram restart alert with last-task context + clears queue. Hooks wired in ~/.claude/settings.json (Stop + PreToolUse). 7 test cases PASS. 2 bugs fixed: schtasks /RL HIGHEST elevation rejection, en-IL locale date format mismatch. Report: agents/andy/inbox/mack_rate_limit_watchdog_done.md.
